title: Fortune Cookie Factory Memo
text:
## Fortune Cookie Factory Memo

Team, production of {adjective} fortunes begins at {number} AM.

Please stop inserting messages about {plural noun}, especially after {person} found one inside a {food}.

Approved fortunes may mention {emotion}, a future {job}, or a journey to {place} by {vehicle}.

Do not {verb} near the folding machine or the cookies will become {color}.

Remember: every {object} deserves to {verb} {adverb} beside a {color} {noun} by {day of week}, unless {person} objects.
